prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `ecb67b6d`.
codex_response:
Implemented `task_ecb67b6d` end to end. The rule is: find each 8-connected `5` component and recolor the whole component to `8` iff it contains a straight 3-cell diagonal in either slant. I used the Opus hint as the working hypothesis and discarded the Sonnet hint because its edge-propagation story does not match the official examples; that mismatch is documented in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ecb67b6d/notes.md). No new primitive was added to `arc2/dsl_ext.py`.

The generator explicitly builds separate target and distractor `5` components on a `7` canvas, with target components forced to contain a diagonal run and distractors forced not to, then derives the output by recoloring only the flagged targets. Task package files are [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ecb67b6d/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ecb67b6d/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ecb67b6d/generator.py), [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ecb67b6d/helpers.py), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ecb67b6d/notes.md).

Validation passed:
- Official examples: `pass ecb67b6d: 4/4 official examples passed`
- Generated examples: `pass ecb67b6d: 1000/1000 generated examples passed`

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ecb67b6d/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ecb67b6d/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ecb67b6d/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ecb67b6d/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ecb67b6d/previews/preview_03.png). I also loaded the built preview file successfully and spot-checked generated examples from the built `task.json`; the family looks consistent with the official task.
